creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
We made a few changes to the review (https://reviews.freebsd.org/D8387):

- use latest go-diff GitHub commit
- oo not define DIST_SUBDIR
- replace post-extract target by defining GH_SUBDIR
- replace BUILD_DEPENDS=, and do-build and do-install targets with USES=go

P.S. meant to say, "Under review:", not "Under revision:" in the last comment.
